column1: ("Like you know" it seems obvious her elevator doesn't reach her penthouse!)

column1: Why, beautiful, if you were with me you wouldn't have to worry about any ol' breakdown. We'd be cruisin' in my brand new Porsche, and you wouldn't have a care in the world.

column1: Besides, if something did happen to your heel, I'd just sweep you up in these muscular arms and carry you wherever you wanted to go! When you're a top notch physical specimen like me, a light little feather like you would be a breeze.

column1: (You're sure not even this mental midget would fall for a cornball line like that!)

column1: Oooooh, how sexy! she gushes. "What more could any girl want?"
